zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthold IV von Eberstein於1095年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格時，他的父親Graf Berthold III von Eberstein22歲，母親Adelheide von Calw18歲。他於1120年與Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg在巴登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1158年在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福巴德 賀雷納爾布享年63歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福巴德 賀雷納爾布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthold IV von Eberstein于1095年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格时，他的父亲Graf Berthold III von Eberstein22岁，母亲Adelheide von Calw18岁。他于1120年与Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg在巴登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1158年在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福巴德 賀雷納爾布享年63岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 卡爾福巴德 賀雷納爾布。

nameMeanings.name: Berthold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthold IV von Eberstein was born in 1095, in Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, was 22 and his mother, Adelheide von Calw, was 18. He married Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg in 1120, in Baden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1158, in Bad Herrenalb, Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 63, and was buried in Bad Herrenalb, Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthold IV von Eberstein est né en 1095, à Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Adelheide von Calw, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg en 1120, à Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1158, à Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthold IV von Eberstein 1095 in Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Berthold III von Eberstein 22 und seine Mutter Adelheide von Calw 18. Er hat 1120 in Baden Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1158 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

Lui sposato Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg nel 1120, nel Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1158, nel Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthold IV von Ebersteinが1095年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグで生まれた時，父Graf Berthold III von Ebersteinは22歳，母Adelheide von Calwは18歳であった。1120年にバデンでUta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1158年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイス カルウバド ハーレナルブで63歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイス カルウバド ハーレナルブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthold IV von Eberstein(이)가 1095년 독일 바데-wu르테버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Berthold III von Eberstein(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheide von Calw(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1120년 바든에서 Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1158년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 캘w 바드 허리널브에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 캘w 바드 허리널브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthold IV von Eberstein nasceu em 1095, em Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Adelheide von Calw, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg em 1120, em Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1158, em Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthold IV von Eberstein родился в 1095 г. в местности баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Berthold III von Eberstein было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheide von Calw, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg в 1120 г. в местности баден. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1158 г. в местности бад хирреналб, крис калв, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности бад хирреналб, крис калв, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthold IV von Eberstein nació en 1095, en Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Graf Berthold III von Eberstein, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Adelheide von Calw, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg en 1120, en Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1158, en Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Bad Herrenalb, Kreis Calw, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
